name: intent-eval-dashboard
description: Public reports dashboard for the Intent Eval Platform. Renders eval-set methodology + signed Evidence Bundles at labs.intentsolutions.io.
author: Jeremy Longshore <jeremy@intentsolutions.io>

scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build

pnpm.//: @intentsolutions/core@0.2.0 (Epic 2.1 schema evolution) is not yet PUBLISHED to npm — only 0.1.1 is. Epic 2.2 DEPENDS ON 0.2.0 per the bead. Until 0.2.0 publishes, resolve the kernel from the local sibling checkout. When 0.2.0 lands on npm, delete this override and the dependency range resolves normally from the registry.
